label: Water Ripple
description: Set waterRipple effect of the Component.

parameters.label: Progress
parameters.description: - Indicates the ripple progress. The value 1 indicates that ripples are displayed on all screens.

parameters.label: Wave Count
parameters.description: - The number of waves when the water ripples. The maximum count of waves is 3, the minimum value is 1, default is 2.

parameters.label: X
parameters.description: - Represents the X-axis position of center point where the water ripple first appears on the screen.

parameters.label: Y
parameters.description: - Represents the Y-axis position of center point where the water ripple first appears on the screen.

parameters.label: Ripple Mode
parameters.description: - Set the mode of water ripple, 0 for mobile to desktop(Receive), 1 for mobile to desktop(Send), 2 for mobile to mobile, 3 for cross platform.
